atomic_document.content:
Open-ended language generation Dataset (BOLD) for bias The Amazon Nova Micro model provides ultra-fast text generation through the Chat/Text playground, delivering the lowest latency responses at minimal cost️ Amazon Nova Lite processes combined image and text inputs rapidly at low cost, supporting efficient multimodal AI applications. Amazon Nova Canvas generates high-quality images from text prompts through the Image/Video playground. Amazon Nova Premier (Massive) or Pro Model distillation transfers knowledge from a large teacher model to a smaller student model. For proprietary data synthesis techniques, you must use only prompts. CloudWatch Genia observability is purpose-built to monitor and troubleshoot GenAI applications. Amazon Nova Pro delivers advanced text and code generation with enhanced reasoning capabilities for complex problem-solving tasks. - High response times -> Drop satisfaction score - Text-based + product image - Multilingual, route image to complaints, set up safe env, automated responses common question Use the build LoRA class `LoraConfig` from [huggingface 🤗 PEFT: State-of-the-art Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning](https://github.com/huggingface/peft). Within `LoraConfig`, specify the following parameters:
- `r`, the dimension of the low-rank matrices - `lora_alpha`, the scaling factor for the low-rank matrices - `lora_dropout`, the dropout probability of the LoRA layers # **Robust Random Cut Forest (RCF)**
A machine learning algorithm used **for anomaly detection**, created by Amazon and used in **Amazon SageMaker**.
PEFT is Parameter efficient fine tunning or fine tuning mix with lora Use RLFH as well with human feedback PPO
